evidence_notes: PETROVSKY ZVEZDA — repeated AIS blackouts near Karimata Strait coincide with known STS window. Draft delta indicates crude transfer. Owner: anonymous Marshall Islands entity formed post-sanctions.
SARI NOUR — three ownership transfers in 18 months; current flag Cameroon after Palau. AIS gap 14h at 1.1N 103.8E. P&I lapsed.
OCEAN VOYAGER — STS candidate detected x3 in 90 days near East Johor Strait. Name changed from BLUE HORIZON six months ago.
VERA SUNSET — loitering 16h at Riau Islands anchorage. Cargo declared 'general' but draft profile suggests crude. Owner shares address with two OFAC-proximate entities.
Flag: unknown. Single AIS gap 8h near Pedra Branca. Insufficient corroborating evidence — under monitoring.
Vessel confirmed as Philippine coastguard supply craft. AIS gaps explained by operational protocol. Cleared after cross-check with MARINA Philippines.
Verified container feeder on Singapore–Batam route. Regular MPA port calls documented. No evasion indicators.
